userMessage: Set up search on B1 for CAN FD error frames

response.text:
I built the verified flow and left the CAN FD ISO/non-ISO choice as a comment instead of guessing.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Build a new pyvisa scope flow that configures SEARCH1 on B1 for CAN error-frame searching and preserves the unresolved CAN FD standard choice as a manual comment.","findings":["The request does not specify whether B1 should use BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDISO or BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDNONISO, so that command was not guessed."],"suggestedFixes":["Replace the comment step with a verified write step for BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDISO or BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDNONISO once the CAN FD variant is known.","Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.","Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Search B1 CAN FD Error Frames","description":"Configure SEARCH1 on bus B1 for CAN error-frame searching using verified SCPI; CAN FD ISO/non-ISO standard remains a manual choice.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true},"id":"s1_1"},{"type":"write","label":"Configure B1 Bus","params":{"command":"BUS:B1:TYPe CAN; DISplay:WAVEView1:BUS:B1:STATE ON"},"id":"s1_2"},{"type":"comment","label":"Comment","params":{"text":"Manual completion required: choose the CAN FD variant for B1 with either BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDISO or BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDNONISO."},"id":"s1_3"},{"type":"write","label":"Select SEARCH1 and Source B1","params":{"command":"SEARCH:SELected SEARCH1; SEARCH:SEARCH1:TRIGger:A:TYPe BUS; SEARCH:SEARCH1:TRIGger:A:BUS:SOUrce B1"},"id":"s1_4"},{"type":"write","label":"Match CAN Error Frames","params":{"command":"SEARCH:SEARCH1:TRIGger:A:BUS:CAN:CONDition FRAMEtype; SEARCH:SEARCH1:TRIGger:A:BUS:CAN:FRAMEtype ERRor"},"id":"s1_5"},{"type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"},"id":"s1_6"},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]},"id":"s1_7"}]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Build a new pyvisa scope flow that configures SEARCH1 on B1 for CAN error-frame searching and preserves the unresolved CAN FD standard choice as a manual comment.
findings: The request does not specify whether B1 should use BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDISO or BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDNONISO, so that command was not guessed.
suggestedFixes: Replace the comment step with a verified write step for BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDISO or BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDNONISO once the CAN FD variant is known.
Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.
Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias "scope1" for direct chat apply compatibility.

flow.name: Search B1 CAN FD Error Frames
flow.description: Configure SEARCH1 on bus B1 for CAN error-frame searching using verified SCPI; CAN FD ISO/non-ISO standard remains a manual choice.

params.text: Manual completion required: choose the CAN FD variant for B1 with either BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDISO or BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDNONISO.

params.command: SEARCH:SELected SEARCH1; SEARCH:SEARCH1:TRIGger:A:TYPe BUS; SEARCH:SEARCH1:TRIGger:A:BUS:SOUrce B1
